glosses.vi: cư dân nữ; người dân nữ
glosses.ja: 女性住民; 女性居住者

translations.en: She is a resident of Cologne.
translations.ja: 彼女はケルンに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; 3rd person singular feminine functioning as the subject.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking the subject to a predicate nominal.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal specifying the status/profession of the subject after 'sein'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces origin/source ('von Köln').
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'von' (dative, no article with city names).

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist Einwohnerin hier im Ort.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈaɪ̯nvoːnəʁɪn hiːɐ̯ ɪm ɔʁt./

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Einwohnerin hier im Ort.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈaɪ̯nvoːnəʁɪn hiːɐ̯ ɪm ɔʁt./
translations.en: My sister is a resident here in town.
translations.es: Mi hermana vive aquí en el pueblo.
translations.fr: Ma sœur habite ici au village.
translations.it: Mia sorella vive qui in paese.
translations.ru: Моя сестра живёт здесь в городе.
translations.pt: Minha irmã mora aqui na cidade.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi sống ở thị trấn này.
translations.nl: Mijn zus woont hier in het dorp.
translations.uk: Моя сестра живе тут у містечку.
translations.hu: A húgom itt él a városban.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन इस कस्बे में रहती है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra mieszka tutaj w miasteczku.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου μένει εδώ στην κωμόπολη.
translations.nb: Søsteren min bor her i bygda.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya tinggal di kota ini.
translations.sv: Min syster bor här i byn.
translations.ro: Sora mea locuiește aici în oraș.
translations.cs: Moje sestra tu ve městě bydlí.
translations.da: Min søster bor her i byen.
translations.ja: 妹はこの町に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Schwester'; agrees in gender/number/case (fem sg nominative).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominal complement after 'sein'.
Local adverb indicating location; modifies the clause.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('in dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs the dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (masculine dative singular).

sentences.target: Als Einwohnerin zahle ich weniger Eintritt.

translations.de: Als Einwohnerin zahle ich weniger Eintritt.
translations.en: As a resident, I pay less admission.
translations.es: Como residente pago menos por la entrada.
translations.fr: En tant que résidente, je paie l'entrée moins cher.
translations.zh-Hans: 作为本地居民，我买门票更便宜。
translations.yue: 作為居民，我入場費平啲。
translations.ru: Как местная жительница, я плачу за вход меньше.
translations.pt: Como moradora, pago menos na entrada.
translations.he: כתושבת אני משלמת פחות דמי כניסה.
translations.tr: Burada yaşayan biri olarak giriş ücretini daha az ödüyorum.
translations.vi: Là cư dân, tôi trả tiền vé vào cửa ít hơn.
translations.nl: Als inwoner betaal ik minder entree.
translations.uk: Як місцева мешканка, я плачу за вхід менше.
translations.hi: एक निवासी के रूप में मैं कम प्रवेश शुल्क देती हूँ।
translations.pl: Jako mieszkanka płacę mniej za wstęp.
translations.el: Ως κάτοικος πληρώνω λιγότερα για την είσοδο.
translations.nb: Som innbygger betaler jeg mindre i inngangspenger.
translations.id: Sebagai warga, saya membayar lebih murah untuk masuk.
translations.sv: Som boende betalar jag mindre i inträde.
translations.ro: Ca rezidentă, plătesc mai puțin la intrare.
translations.cs: Jako místní obyvatelka platím nižší vstupné.
translations.da: Som beboer betaler jeg mindre i entré.
translations.ja: 居住者なので、入場料は安くなります。

tokens.explanation: Subordinating conjunction introducing a role/comparison phrase ('als Einwohnerin') functioning as an adverbial.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'als' in the role phrase.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg); transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'zahle'.
Quantifier functioning as a determiner; modifies 'Eintritt' to indicate a smaller amount.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object in the accusative of 'zahle'.

sentences.target: Die neue Einwohnerin kennt schon den Bäcker.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə ˈaɪ̯nvoːnəʁɪn kɛnt ʃoːn deːn ˈbɛkɐ./

translations.de: Die neue Einwohnerin kennt schon den Bäcker.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə ˈaɪ̯nvoːnəʁɪn kɛnt ʃoːn deːn ˈbɛkɐ./
translations.en: The new resident already knows the baker.
translations.es: La nueva vecina ya conoce al panadero.
translations.fr: La nouvelle résidente connaît déjà le boulanger.
translations.it: La nuova residente conosce già il panettiere.
translations.ko: 새로 온 주민은 벌써 빵집 주인을 알아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 新来的居民已经认识面包师了。
translations.yue: 新搬嚟嘅居民已經識嗰個麵包師傅。
translations.pt: A nova moradora já conhece o padeiro.
translations.he: התושבת החדשה כבר מכירה את האופה.
translations.vi: Người mới đến đã quen thợ làm bánh rồi.
translations.nl: De nieuwe inwoonster kent de bakker al.
translations.hu: Az új lakos már ismeri a péket.
translations.hi: नई निवासी पहले से ही बेकरी वाले को जानती है।
translations.el: Η νέα κάτοικος γνωρίζει ήδη τον φούρναρη.
translations.nb: Den nye innbyggeren kjenner allerede bakeren.
translations.id: Warga baru itu sudah kenal tukang roti.
translations.sv: Den nya invånaren känner redan bagaren.
translations.ro: Noua rezidentă îl cunoaște deja pe brutar.
translations.da: Den nye beboer kender allerede bageren.
translations.ja: 新しい住人はもうパン屋さんを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject NP; feminine nominative singular.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection after a definite article; agrees with 'Einwohnerin' (fem nom sg).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); transitive verb taking an accusative object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating prior familiarity.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular marking the object NP.
Common noun; head of the object NP (masculine), direct object of 'kennt'.
